detail1: "Randomly flies towards a seed and infects it. White seeds will make your screen darker for a bit."
detail2: - Every 10 to 15 seconds, Fade will go to a random seed, and infect it. Collecting an infected seed will darken your screen for a couple of seconds.
detail3: - Fade is one of the starting enemies, meaning it appears at level 1.
detail4: - Fade has a limit of 3 permanant Fades and has no temporary cap.
detail5: "Butterflies can't kill so no one died." "The infection spreaded to Victim." "And Fade strikes again."
